message:
refactor(pthread): remove unused thread join table infrastructure

Removed ~35 lines of unused thread management code:
- Removed Cell, HashMap, Mutex, OnceLock, thread imports
- Removed JoinTable type alias
- Removed NEXT_THREAD_ID atomic counter
- Removed SELF_ID thread-local storage
- Removed join_table() static accessor
- Removed lock_join_table() helper

This code was infrastructure for a thread tracking system that was
never connected to the actual pthread shim implementation. The mutex
operations use direct host pthread delegation for unmanaged mutexes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
